import React, { useState } from 'react'; const AuthFlow = ({ onComplete }) => { const [step, setStep] = useState('signin'); // signin, signup, profile const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ email: '', password: '', name: '', dateOfBirth: '', diagnosisType: '', autismType: '', selfDiagnosed: false, sensorySensitivity: { light: 3, sound: 3, touch: 3 } }); const handleInputChange = (e) => { const { name, value, type, checked } = e.target; setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [name]: type === 'checkbox' ? checked : value })); }; const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (step === 'signin') { // Handle sign in logic setStep('profile'); } else if (step === 'signup') { setStep('profile'); } else if (step === 'profile') { onComplete(formData); } }; const renderSignIn = () => (

Welcome Back

Don't have an account?{' '}

); const renderSignUp = () => (

Create Account

Already have an account?{' '}

); const renderProfileSetup = () => (

Complete Your Profile

Low High
Low High
Low High
); return (
{step === 'signin' && renderSignIn()} {step === 'signup' && renderSignUp()} {step === 'profile' && renderProfileSetup()}
); }; export default AuthFlow;
